{% load i18n %}

{% trans 'Automate your alerts' %}

{% trans 'You have the option to automate your alerts and send them to any broker of your choice for trade execution, allowing you to start generating profits.' %}
{% trans "You'll need to use one of the available TradingView automation softwares that will be provided by a third-party application." %}

{% trans 'These are some companies that you can use' %}

{% include "include/docs/automation_sites.html" %}

{% trans 'Alert messages' %}

{% trans 'Each automation company will provide you with the types of messages that you will need to automate the trades. The messages will be for entry and exit signals.' %}
{% trans 'Checkout' %} {% trans 'the alerts page' %} {% trans 'to see where you can add the alert messages and create the TradingView alert.' %}

{% trans 'Webhook URL' %}

{% trans "The final step is to copy the webhook URL that you'll get from the automation company and paste it into the webhook URL field in TradingView when you create the alert." %}

{% trans "After pasting the webhook, simply click 'Save,' and you'll be ready to go. Once an alert fires, check your broker to see your trade active." %}
